zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Grandmesnil於1032年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，他的父親Robert de Grandmesnil43歲，母親Havoïse d'Eschauffour26歲。他於1048年與Adeliza Beaumont在法國豪-諾門迪艾布聶維爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1098年2月22日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年66歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪奧內沙吉艾福盧吉諾特-達-度-波斯。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Grandmesnil was born in 1032, in Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Robert de Grandmesnil, was 43 and his mother, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, was 26. He married Adeliza Beaumont in 1048, in Bourneville, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 22 February 1098, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Grandmesnil est né en 1032, à Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Grandmesnil, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Adeliza Beaumont en 1048, à Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 22 février 1098, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Grandmesnil 1032 in Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Grandmesnil 43 und seine Mutter Havoïse d'Eschauffour 26. Er hat 1048 in Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Adeliza Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1098 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Adeliza Beaumont nel 1048, nel Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1098, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Grandmesnilが1032年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父Robert de Grandmesnilは43歳，母Havoïse d'Eschauffourは26歳であった。1048年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアボウルネヴィルでAdeliza Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1098年2月22日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで66歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンサイント-evロウルト-ノトレ-ダム-ドウ-ボイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Grandmesnil(이)가 1032년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Grandmesnil(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Havoïse d'Eschauffour(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1048년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 부른에빌에서 Adeliza Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1098년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 세인트-e브루트-노트레-다-드-보이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Grandmesnil nasceu em 1032, em Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Grandmesnil, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeliza Beaumont em 1048, em Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1098, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Grandmesnil родился в 1032 г. в местности калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Grandmesnil было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Havoïse d'Eschauffour, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeliza Beaumont в 1048 г. в местности бурневилл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 22 февраля 1098 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-eвроулт-нотре-дэме-ду-боис, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Grandmesnil nació en 1032, en Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Grandmesnil, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Adeliza Beaumont en 1048, en Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1098, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
